creator: qjail1@a1poweruser.com
text:
Created attachment 174131
port_diff

Using the current qjail-4.9 port apply the patch to create a new port named qjail3. This qjail3 port is restricted to install only on 10.x OS. This is pretty much like qjail2 being restricted to 9.x OS. This is in preparation for publication of RELEASE-11.0. 

Following shortly there will be a PR to update qjail to version qjail-5.0 which is restricted to only install on 11.0 and newer RELEASES.
